acceptanceCriteria.statement: demo-todo-app.execute is the only public surface for the Demo Todo App responsibility unit.
Successful execution returns declared output: result.
Invalid or out-of-contract calls fail fast through declared errors: BOUNDARY_CONTRACT_VIOLATION.
Ready gate passes before implementation starts and Done requires verification plus wiki evidence.

goals: Implement the Demo Todo App responsibility unit inside src/todo-app/**.
Expose demo-todo-app.execute with the declared input, output, and error contract.
Verify the responsibility unit with node -e console.log('todo tests pass').
nonGoals: Generate production implementation code during planning.
Infer undeclared fallback behavior for external SDKs or APIs.
request: Build a simple todo list module with add, remove, toggle, and list operations. Each todo has an id, title, and completed status.
title: Build a simple todo list module with add, remove, toggle, and list operations. Each todo has an id, title, and completed status.
userVisibleBehavior: demo-todo-app.execute accepts request, returns result, and fails through BOUNDARY_CONTRACT_VIOLATION.
